---
title: "LLM Linguistic Evolution: Language and Cooperation in LLM Dyads"
author:
  - name: Aron Vallinder
    affiliations:
      - id: aff1
        name: Affiliation TBD
date: last-modified
bibliography: references.json
csl: neurips.csl
google-scholar: false
abstract: "Abstract placeholder."
---

<!--
  Section includes track the most-developed stage of each section.
  When ms-writer produces .c_final.md from .b_draft.md, swap that section's
  include to .c_final.md. End-state: every include is .c_final.md.
-->

{{< include _0-introduction.b_draft.md >}}

{{< include _1-background.a_outline.md >}}

{{< include _2-method.b_draft.md >}}

{{< include _3-results.a_outline.md >}}

{{< include _4-discussion.a_outline.md >}}

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

{{< include _5-appendix.c_final.md >}}
